ul.li: Inputs: Dialect/QNet/QNet.td (canonical TD), lib/Python/mlir_qnet/dialects/QNetOps.td (Python-binding TD that just includes the canonical one), lib/Python/QNetExtension.cpp (manual type registration).
CMake step: declare_mlir_dialect_python_bindings + declare_mlir_python_extension → output package build/python_packages/qnet_bindings/qnet/.
Optional packaging step: python -m build -w → wheel containing qnet + bundled qoala-opt/qoala-translate binaries.
Final consumer: euqalyptus imports qnet.dialects.qnet and qnet.ir.

div.p: Use this figure to make the build dependency between qoala-mlir and the Python bindings concrete.
